subjects.description: fireworks bursting above a dark lake
subjects.appearance_details: red, blue, and green starbursts with fine sparkling trails, bright smoke halos, mirrored streaks on the water
subjects.relationship: main aerial spectacle launched from the barge and watched by the crowd
subjects.location: upper sky above the lake, reflected across the lower frame
subjects.orientation: radiating outward from launch points over the water
subjects.pose: expanding circular and fan shaped bursts
subjects.action: explode, glitter, fade, and are replaced by new bursts
subjects.state_changes: dark sky shifts through bright colors, smoke grows subtly, reflections ripple after each burst
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: brilliant colored light with smoky sparkling particles

subjects.appearance_details: mixed silhouettes and softly lit faces, several phones and cameras raised, jackets and casual evening clothes
subjects.relationship: audience reacting to the fireworks across the lake
subjects.location: lower shoreline in the foreground and middle distance
subjects.relative_size: small compared with the sky and lake
subjects.pose: standing close together, some with arms raised to record
subjects.action: watch, cheer, applaud, and film the display
subjects.state_changes: faces flash red, blue, and green as each burst lights the shore
subjects.clothing: casual evening jackets, hoodies, and shirts
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: varied skin tones softly illuminated by colored fireworks
subjects.facial_features: brief smiles and open mouths visible in the colored glow

subjects.description: low fireworks launch barge on the lake
subjects.appearance_details: dark rectangular platform with small launch racks, brief flashes at ignition points, faint smoke drifting above it
subjects.location: middle distance on the lake below the bursts
subjects.relative_size: small but visible against the water reflections
subjects.state_changes: brief sparks flare from the racks before each sky burst
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: dark metal platform with wet reflective edges

background_setting: night lake with a dark open sky, a low shoreline crowd, and shimmering reflections of fireworks across tranquil water

style_medium: photorealistic text to video event scene

context: a public evening fireworks show unfolds over a quiet lake while spectators gather along the shore

actions.description: first red and blue bursts bloom overhead while the barge flickers below
multiple green and red explosions overlap, reflections stretch across the water, and spectators raise phones
sparkling trails fade into smoke as applause rises and new colors ripple across the lake
